title: Backported Fall Drop 2025 Dyes
body:
# Backported Fall Drop 2025 Dyes

Get a sneak peek at the Fall Drop 2025 before it officially launches! This resource pack backports the vibrant new dye textures and color palette changes showcased in the Minecraft Bedrock Preview directly into your current version of Java Edition.

Perfect for creators, builders, and early testers, Backported Fall Drop 2025 Dyes brings you the latest cosmetic updates from Mojang’s upcoming seasonal release — including overhauled dye item icons.

Whether you're testing out the upcoming Fall Drop 2025 features or just love the new aesthetic, this backport will keep your game looking fresh and ahead of the curve.

# Tags

Minecraft Bedrock Preview, Fall Drop 2025, Backport, New Dyes Update, Minecraft Seasonal Drops, Resource or Texture Pack, Dye Texture Update, Minecraft Beta Textures

# Unlicensed

This resource pack includes textures from the Minecraft Fall Drop 2025 Preview, originally created by Mojang Studios.
All original textures and assets are © Mojang Studios / Microsoft, and used under the terms of the Minecraft EULA and Usage Guidelines.
This is a non-commercial fan project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Mojang.
No ownership of Mojang assets is claimed.
No custom license is applied to this project, as the textures belong to Mojang.
